---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
---

## 🎯 Description
A clear description of the feature request.

## 💡 Motivation
Why you need this feature.

## 📋 Proposed Solution
How you think it should work.

## 🔄 Alternatives
Other solutions or features you've considered.

## 📚 Additional Context
Any other context or examples.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I've searched for similar requests
- [ ] I've provided a clear title
- [ ] I've included motivation
- [ ] I've considered implementation approach
